summary: Send the X-Device header on every request in internal/client/client.go.
reason: TickTick V2 rejects /batch/check/0 with access_forbidden unless X-Device is present; the header's JSON value could not be declared via spec required_headers because the generator emits it unescaped into a Go string literal (generation syntax error).
validated_outcome: Live: /batch/check/0 returned 500 access_forbidden without the header and 200 with it; full live dogfood 88/88 after the patch.
